stored_sqli.description: Second-order SQL injection -- payload stored via one endpoint, triggered when retrieved/processed by another

probes.description: String concatenation probe stored in profile/name field -- triggers when value is used unsanitized in a different query context (reports, admin views, exports)
Comment injection in stored username -- if used in WHERE clause on admin panel, it truncates the query

stored_xss.description: Stored XSS -- payload saved in one context, rendered in another (admin panel, email, PDF export, notification)

probes.description: Image tag XSS in stored field -- triggers when rendered in admin panel, email template, or PDF export without sanitization
Attribute breakout XSS in stored field -- triggers when value rendered inside HTML attribute in different context

stored_ssti.description: Second-order SSTI -- template expression stored via user input, executed when rendered in email template, PDF, or report

probes.description: Jinja2/Twig expression in stored field -- if email/PDF template engine processes the stored value, 49 appears in output
Freemarker/EL expression in stored field -- processed when value rendered in server-side template

stored_header_injection.description: Second-order header injection -- stored value used in HTTP response headers (Set-Cookie, Location, Content-Disposition)

probes.description: CRLF in stored filename -- when used in Content-Disposition header on download, injects arbitrary headers
